general-sub: How Maximal shows up on your desktop.
general-menu-bar-only-label: Show in {os, select, macos {menu bar} other {system tray}} only
general-menu-bar-only-hint: By default Maximal also lives in your {os, select, macos {Dock} other {taskbar}}, so it’s easy to spot and bring forward. Turn this on to tuck it out of the way — Maximal keeps running with just its {os, select, macos {menu-bar} other {system-tray}} icon, and steps out of the {os, select, macos {Dock} other {taskbar}}.
account-requirement-sub: Maximal forwards requests through your own Copilot license. {plansLink}.
account-unauth-body: Sign in with the GitHub account that holds your Copilot subscription. Until you do, the proxy accepts connections but rejects Copilot calls.
account-pending-body: We’ll copy your sign-in code and open GitHub for you. Paste the code on the GitHub page to finish.
account-roster-sub: Other accounts saved on this {os, select, macos {Mac} other {computer}}. Switching restarts the proxy signed in as that account.
account-switch-different: Sign in as a different account
account-rosters-divider: or use an account you already know
account-remembered-sub: Accounts you’ve signed into before on this {os, select, macos {Mac} other {computer}}. Picking one restarts the proxy signed in as that account.
account-gh-reuse-sub: Sign in with an account you’re already logged into with {ghCode} on this {os, select, macos {Mac} other {computer}} — no code to copy.
account-confirm-sign-out: Sign out? The proxy will restart and stop forwarding Copilot requests until you sign in again.
account-confirm-remove: Remove {login}? Maximal forgets its saved sign-in. This doesn’t sign you out of gh or GitHub in the browser.
account-err-gh-use-generic: Couldn’t sign in with that account. Try the code-based sign-in above.
account-err-gh-use-authless: Signed in as {login}, but the proxy came back unauthenticated — that account may not have Copilot access on this host.
account-err-gh-use-no-restart: Sign-in didn’t complete — the proxy may not have restarted. Try again, or use the code-based sign-in above.
account-err-switch-authless: Switched, but the proxy came back unauthenticated — that account’s token may no longer be valid.
account-err-switch-no-restart: Switch didn’t complete — the proxy may not have restarted. Try again.
banner-offline-msg: Check your connection; we’ll keep trying.
banner-copilot-msg-enterprise: If other apps aren’t working either, you may need to restart ({service}).
account-rejection-explain-402: Check your Copilot plan or billing on GitHub, then try again.
account-rejection-explain-403: This model or request isn’t allowed on your current plan.
account-rejection-explain-timeout: It took too long to respond. Try again in a moment.
account-rejection-explain-429: You’ve hit a rate or quota limit. Wait a moment and try again.
account-rejection-explain-5xx: GitHub’s side returned an error. This is usually temporary — try again shortly.
account-rejection-explain-other: Try again, or check your Copilot account on GitHub.
apps-sub: One-click setup for the tools that talk to Maximal. Turn an app on and we point it at the proxy for you.
endpoint-sub: Where Maximal listens. Use these values when wiring up a tool that isn’t in the Apps list.
endpoint-hint: The key rotates every time Maximal restarts. Use {apiKeysLink} to mint a stable, named key for long-running tools.
keys-sub: Keys that apps use to call Maximal. Add one per tool so you can tell them apart — anything not listed still works by default.
models-sub: Models available to apps through Maximal, grouped by kind. The list is fetched from the provider — refresh to pull the current catalog if a model looks missing.
logs-sub: Daily-rotated request and handler logs, {n, plural, one {#-day} other {#-day}} retention.
logs-where-hint: Each handler writes a per-day file under the maximal state directory. Reveal the folder to inspect them, or tail the active file with {tailCmd}.
logs-retention-value: {n, plural, one {# day} other {# days}}, then deleted on next boot
diagnostics-sub: Live state and a one-click bundle for bug reports.
diagnostics-copilot-refresh: Token will refresh on first request
uninstall-hint: This stops Maximal’s background agent, reverts any app integrations, and removes the {cliName} CLI from your PATH. You’ll drag Maximal to the Trash to finish.
uninstall-confirm:
Uninstall Maximal?

This stops the background agent and {summary}. You’ll drag the app to the Trash to finish.

This can’t be undone.
uninstall-err: Couldn’t finish uninstalling: {error}. You can run {uninstallCmd} in the terminal instead.
uninstall-complete: Maximal is uninstalled. Quit Maximal from the {os, select, macos {menu bar} other {system tray}}, then drag it from Applications to the Trash to finish.
dashboard-events-meta: Page {page} / {total} · {events, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}
dashboard-empty-summary: No token usage recorded for the selected period.
dashboard-empty-events: No token usage detail rows for the selected period.
dashboard-welcome-body: Usage and token-usage data will appear here as it loads.
native-notify-startup-body-macos: Look for the Maximal icon in your menu bar ↑
native-notify-startup-body-other: Maximal is running in your system tray ↓
native-notify-signin-body: Maximal needs your GitHub Copilot account before it can serve requests. Click here — or the menu-bar icon — to open Settings and sign in.
native-notify-failed-body: The background proxy failed to start. Click the menu-bar icon to retry startup or view the logs.
native-notify-failed-body-reason: {reason} — click the menu-bar icon to retry startup or view the logs.
native-notify-rejection-body: An upstream Copilot request was rejected. Open Settings for details.
native-quit-body: Maximal will stop and any open Settings windows will close.
